productDisplayName: Scullers Men Check Navy Blue Shorts

Designed for off-duty wear and crafted from quality cotton fabric, this piece makes for a perfect addition to your wardrobe. Wear it on a casual day out or when roughing it out in the great outdoors. Team it with funky t-shirts and casual shoes. Model statistics The product is size M on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
